gpt2.description: Standard starter activation catalog for a single GPT-2 style causal language model.

activations.name: zero_shot_prompting
activations.summary: Ask for the task directly without worked examples.

activations.name: few_shot_prompting
activations.summary: Prime the model with a small number of input-output exemplars.

activations.name: role_prompting
activations.summary: Assign a stable role or persona before the task request.

activations.name: retrieval_augmented_context
activations.summary: Inject retrieved reference material into the model context window.

activations.name: scratchpad_context
activations.summary: Reserve context for intermediate notes, plans, or tool outputs.

activations.name: instruction_hierarchy
activations.summary: Separate system-level constraints from task-level context and examples.

activations.name: react
activations.summary: Interleave reasoning traces with explicit actions and observations.

activations.name: reflection
activations.summary: Evaluate draft reasoning and revise before finalizing an answer.

activations.name: chain_of_thought
activations.summary: Encourage intermediate reasoning steps before the final answer.

activations.name: tree_of_thought
activations.summary: Explore multiple candidate reasoning branches before choosing one.

activations.name: self_consistency
activations.summary: Sample multiple reasoning paths and aggregate toward a stable answer.
